title: Hiring Store Manager at Cafe Coffee Day

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Cafe Coffee Day
jsonLd.description:
Cafe Coffee Day is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Pune. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Cafe Coffee Day:
Cafe Coffee Day is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cafe Coffee Day!
